query: DELETE FROM leaderboard_records WHERE playerName != 'Al' OR (playerName = 'Al' AND score != (SELECT MAX(score) FROM leaderboard_records WHERE playerName = 'Al'));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3T24fVMTLCwvQj3.root --database gyEVyyMtKSRsneZFu6czsm --execute DELETE FROM leaderboard_records WHERE playerName != 'Al' OR (playerName = 'Al' AND score != (SELECT MAX(score) FROM leaderboard_records WHERE playerName = 'Al'));
